name: Admin Editor
author: civicognita
description: Document editor for administration projects — policies, procedures, templates, and reports

widgets.content:
## Admin Editor

Create and manage administrative documents.

- **Policies & procedures** with version tracking
- **Templates** for recurring documents
- **Reports** with AI-assisted drafting
- **Document index** for quick navigation

Documents are organized by type in your project directory.

prompts.label: Document Assistant
prompts.description: AI assistance for drafting administrative documents
prompts.systemPrompt: This is an administration project. Help the user draft, edit, and organize administrative documents such as policies, procedures, meeting notes, and reports. Use clear, professional language.

tools.label: Document Index
tools.description: List all documents in the project
